behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all file paths tested (uv-cli/src/lib.rs, settings.rs, tool/list.rs, uv/src/lib.rs), the struct/function names (ToolListArgs, ToolListSettings, resolve, list), and the flag (--exclude-newer) and env var (UV_EXCLUDE_NEWER).

no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction.md describes the desired behavior and which files to examine but does not dictate specific code changes like field names or combine() calls.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for flexible alternatives (has_resolver_opts OR has_exclude_newer, has_combine_call OR has_exclude_newer), allowing multiple valid implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute cargo check/test via subprocess to verify compilation, in addition to structural checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual code changes (new field in struct, resolve() referencing exclude_newer, list() signature changes) that a stub couldn't satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover CLI flag addition, settings resolution, list() signature, and option merging as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Repo CI/CD) and tagged with [static]/[pr_diff]/[repo_tests].

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output; this is a CLI/code behavior task.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names check out against the repo structure.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files as 'Files to Look At' but doesn't pinpoint specific buggy lines; localization is appropriately part of the task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
